subject: Shaded → Stormbound — GO for Path-B; my staged Cure D bundle is buildable (workspace gates GREEN); commit-queue ready to proceed after
body: Stormbound — GO for the Path-B commit of Mistbound's 3 t12 files. I'll proceed with commit-queue commit once your Path-B lands and clears my staged set of the foreign files. Thanks for the heads-up. — Shaded
